description: Update timecard entry signature with the provided signature ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the timecard entry.

400.description: An improper signature ID was submitted or the signature ID was omitted.

403.description: User does not have permission to sign the provided timecard entry.

404.description: The timecard entry was not found.

signature_id.description: The signature ID to be added to the timecard entry.
